---
name: "TH7 E1 — Verification-Specific Kickoff Policies"
about: "Implement TH7.E1 Verification-Specific Kickoff Policies"
labels: [epic, TH7, E1]
assignees: [copilot]
---

- [ ] US1 — Route verification tasks into narrower sub-profiles: distinguish stats, workflow-verification, and general verification profiles in machine-readable kickoff output.
- [ ] US2 — Apply verification-specific suppressions and allowlists: filter stats and workflow audits using narrower evidence policies.
- [ ] US3 — Introduce verification-safe minimal and abstain defaults: let verification tasks minimize or abstain when aligned evidence is weak.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH7-verification-calibrated-audit-kickoff/epics/E1-verification-specific-kickoff-policies/stories/`
